title: agathaea coelestis
intro: Agathaea coelestis, also known as Agarista coelestis, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It is a member of the family Goodeniaceae, commonly referred to as the Goodenia family. The medicinal properties of Agathaea coelestis include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, and herbal preparations such as teas and infusions can be made from the leaves to harness these benefits.
